description: Minimal net9.0 console with an unused local (int x;). Proves the cdnet image scans .NET end-to-end via the bundled ReSharper CLT (InspectCode discovered on PATH) and emits SARIF with a finding in Program.cs (QD-15021). network: bridge — a .NET restore can reach NuGet even for a zero-dependency project; the CLT itself is baked, so no tool download.

expectations.reason: The CLT must analyze the project and report at least one finding in Program.cs (the unused local `int x;`). Zero findings means the image's .NET SDK + ReSharper CLT scan path is broken — a real signal, not a fixture to weaken. Selector-less by design: asserts the scan ran and located a result, without pinning a ReSharper rule id that can vary by CLT build.
